adit.text: A timber-framed mine adit cuts into the mountain face. The supports are {{adjective}} but standing. Cold air pushes out from the dark — a good sign. Something is preserved inside.

choices.label: Enter the mine and follow the main shaft.

shaft_midpoint.text: The shaft opens into a wider chamber where miners once took breaks. A rusted locker stands against the wall. Equipment crates are stacked in the corner, sealed under a canvas tarp.

choices.label: Push deeper to the main work face.

work_face.text: The work face is untouched. Emergency supply alcoves are cut into the rock walls — miners were required to cache supplies here by law. Most are still full.

partial_collapse.text: A section of the roof gives way. You're buried to the knees before you claw free.

gas_pocket.text: A gas pocket ruptures ahead. The air burns. You turn back, half-conscious, and collapse at the chamber entrance.
